faqData.question: When is the wedding?
faqData.answer: Saturday, April 18, 2026. Ceremony at 2:00 PM, followed by the reception at 4:30 PM.

faqData.question: What should I wear?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask guests to wear formal or semi-formal attire in our wedding colors. Please avoid white so the bride can stand out.

faqData.question: Is RSVP required?
faqData.answer: Yes. Please RSVP by April 1, 2026 so we can confirm seating and final details. If you received an invite, your response helps us plan for you.
